analysis: The current project has a basic structure for a black hole-themed website but lacks the animated objects and slides as specified in the event. The CSS file needs to be enhanced with cosmic animations and interactive elements, and the HTML should include sections for animated slides and black hole information.

improvements.description: Add CSS animations for black hole visuals, including swirling effects, glowing elements, and cosmic background animations to enhance the theme.
Complete the HTML structure by adding sections for animated slides, interactive planets, and detailed black hole information with proper event handlers.
Implement JavaScript functions to handle the animated slides and interactive elements, ensuring smooth transitions and user interactions.
